# Furnituremodern

> Modern, hand-finished furniture made in Tbilisi, Georgia. Sofas, bedrooms, dining and workspace pieces in solid white oak, European walnut, Belgian linen, and full-grain leather.

Furnituremodern is a Tbilisi-based furniture studio. Every piece is produced in small batches in our own workshop, hand-finished, and inspected for fit before shipping. We sell direct, with a 5-year structural warranty on every item.

## Site sections

- Home: `/` — brand introduction, featured categories, story, FAQ.
- Sofas: `/sofas` — two-seaters, three-seaters, modular corners, club chairs, leather daybeds.
- Bedrooms: `/bedrooms` — platform beds, upholstered headboards, dressers, wardrobes, bedside tables, end-of-bed benches.
- Tables & Chairs: `/tables-chairs` — dining tables, dining chairs, writing desks, coffee tables, counter stools.

## Languages

- Georgian (ka) — primary market, default locale, served at `/ka/...`
- English (en) — secondary, served at `/en/...`

## Materials we use

- Solid white oak (kiln-dried, FSC-certified)
- European walnut
- Belgian linen and Italian wool for upholstery
- Full-grain leather from a single tannery
- Removable, dry-cleanable, replaceable cushion covers

## Production and shipping

- Small-batch production in our Tbilisi workshop.
- In-stock items: ship within 5–7 business days inside Georgia.
- Made-to-order items: 4–6 weeks lead time.
- International shipping available across the EU and Caucasus region; quoted individually.

## Warranty

- 5-year structural warranty on the frame, joinery and mechanisms of every piece.
- Cushion covers and upholstery: 2-year warranty against manufacturing defects.

## Contact

- Email: hello@furnituremodern.ge
- Phone: +995 32 200 0000
- Showroom: Aghmashenebeli Avenue 100, Tbilisi 0102, Georgia
- Hours: Mon–Fri 10:00–19:00, Sat 11:00–17:00

- /sitemap.xml — full machine-readable site map.
